Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment Renewal Pursuant To Ccp 473(D)
Off Calendar Apr-17-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK FKA GREENWOOD TRUST COMPANY's Motion To Set Aside Judgment Renewal Pursuant To Ccp 473(D).

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed "motion to set aside judgment renewal pursuant to CCP 473(d)" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
